name: agent-receipts
description: Local-first proof for AI agent claims. One cryptographically identified Rust engine with a tiny npm dispatcher.
author: inchwormz <johnrichardmckeown@gmail.com>

scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:compiler && npm run ready
scripts.test:node: node --test tests/packet_shape_integrity.test.js tests/m0_trust_semantics.test.js tests/forgiving_ingest.test.js tests/receipts_attestation.test.js tests/worklist_resolutions.test.js tests/prime_brief.test.js tests/loop_composites.test.js tests/engine_identity.test.js tests/install_sources.test.js tests/privacy_projection.test.js tests/rust_engine_commands.test.js tests/session_outcomes.test.js tests/import_eval.test.js tests/calibration_baseline.test.js tests/reliability_cards.test.js
